ddls:
CREATE TABLE "visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visit */,
  "url_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visited URL */,
  "visit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the visit in nanoseconds */,
  "from_visit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the page from which the visit originated */,
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Transition type indicating how the user arrived at this page */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user segment */,
  "is_indexed" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the page is indexed for search engines */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the visit in seconds */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the visit */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used (e.g., mobile, desktop) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string */,
  "referrer" TEXT /* Referring URL */,
  "page_views" INTEGER /* Number of page views during the visit */,
  "is_first_time_visit" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the user's first visit to the site */,
  "campaign_id" TEXT /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "utm_source" TEXT /* Source of the visit (e.g., Google, Facebook) */,
  "utm_medium" TEXT /* Medium of the visit (e.g., email, CPC) */,
  "utm_campaign" TEXT /* Specific campaign */,
  "utm_content" TEXT /* Specific content within the campaign */,
  "utm_term" TEXT /* Search term used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_transition_id FOREIGN KEY ("transition_id") REFERENCES transitions ("transition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_url_id FOREIGN KEY ("url_id") REFERENCES urls ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "segments" (
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each segment */,
  "segment_name" TEXT /* Name of the user segment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the segment criteria */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the segment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the segment */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Indicates if the segment is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transitions" (
  "transition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transition type */,
  "transition_type" TEXT /* Type of transition (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transition */,
  "is_external" INTEGER /* Indicates if the transition is from an external source */,
  "transition_description" TEXT /* More detailed description of the transition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "url" TEXT /* The actual URL of the page */,
  "is_indexed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the URL is indexed for search engines */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the URL was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the URL */,
  "page_title" TEXT /* Title of the page */,
  "page_type" TEXT /* Type of page (e.g., product, blog, category) */,
  "page_content" TEXT /* Summary of the page content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the segment the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user */,
  "last_visit_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last visit */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits by the user */,
  "total_page_views" INTEGER /* Total number of page views by the user */,
  "total_time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent on the site by the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is active */,
  "is_subscribed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is subscribed to the newsletter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "total_visits" INTEGER /* Total number of visits in the report */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average visit duration in seconds */,
  "segment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the segment for this report */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the report */,
  "total_page_views" INTEGER /* Total number of page views in the report */,
  "total_time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent on the site in the report */,
  "unique_visitors" INTEGER /* Number of unique visitors */,
  "bounce_rate" TEXT /* Bounce rate */,
  "conversion_rate" TEXT /* Conversion rate */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Revenue generated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_segment_id FOREIGN KEY ("segment_id") REFERENCES segments ("segment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the setting was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the setting */,
  "setting_description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the session */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the session in nanoseconds */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the session in nanoseconds */,
  "visit_duration" INTEGER /* Total duration of the session in seconds */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the session was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the session */,
  "total_page_views" INTEGER /* Total number of page views during the session */,
  "total_time_spent" INTEGER /* Total time spent during the session */,
  "is_completed" INTEGER /* Indicates if the session was completed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
